checklist_items.title: Ensure forum account is tied to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity as part of the submission process.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity requirement and verification during RFRV submission.

checklist_items.title: Verify multi-factor authentication for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Confirm that submitting an RFRV on the Governance Forum requires multi-factor authentication or an equivalent off-chain verification step.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no independent verification of the RFRV submitter's identity outside the forum.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require off-chain or multi-factor verification for RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots/recording demonstrating the MFA/off-chain verification step or relevant system configuration.
